rules.name: Stance
rules.description: An ability with stance gains different effects on odd, even, or special numbered rounds.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: A unit affected by a Miracle has a 5+ effect chance to instantly return to life at 1 hp at the end of any turn it is slain, clearing all tokens. It then loses this trait and you gain 1 SOUL.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (self). Self and allies in the area may convert any number of vitality to strength.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-4

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Remove all negative tokens on an ally, then transfer to self. That ally gains 1 vitality per negative token removed (up to 3 times) and becomes curseproof until the start of its next turn.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Gain 1 vitality. Until end of next turn, self and adjacent allies may spend this unit’s hp as if it were vitality tokens.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Until end of this unit’s next turn, foes ending their turn in range 2 of this unit have a hazard created under them, then are pushed 1.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Range 2-2

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 holy damage and splash (target): 1 holy damage. Stance (Round 3+): and create a hazard under primary target (round 5+) all units in the area.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage. Stance: May step spaces up to the round number with free movement, in a straight line, before the attack. On hit, push target half that many spaces.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Range 2-4

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Stance: Roll the effect die. If you roll under the round number, deal 1 holy damage again. If you roll exactly the round number, deal 2 holy damage again instead.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Any turn

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn end.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: Step spaces equal to 1 + the round number, then push an adjacent unit 1.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own turn.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Line

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn start

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Step 1, then cut a line area with spaces equal to the round number +2, dealing 1 damage to all characters within and pushing those characters 1. Stance (R5+): This damage becomes Devil Damage.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own or allied turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn start

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Unit becomes curseproof until end of its next turn and attacks against it gain -1D for the duration.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Any turn

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: This unit takes damage from an ACT ability, and that ability resolves.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (self): remove 1 negative token on self or gain 1 vitality for every foe in the splash area. Stance (R4+): both effects trigger.

sharedProfiles.name: Supreme Sword Art: Merciful Snowdrop Cut

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own turn.

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: You hit an attack.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (self): 1 holy damage. Stance (R3+): 2 holy damage (R5+): 4 holy damage. (R6+): 5 holy damage.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Any turn

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Allied unit is slain

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Return unit to life at 1 hp at the end of the turn and remove all negative tokens. It becomes immune to all damage and curseproof until the end of its next turn. Stance (R3+) and it gains 1 vitality (R5+) 3 vitality instead.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee, Attack

characteristics.name: Effect
On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Stance (Odd): and step 2, Stance (Even): and gain 1 vitality, Stance (Round 5+): Increase damage to 3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Lacks Miracle. However, while alive, miracle triggers for adjacent allies on a 4+

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Any turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-2

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn start

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Self takes 1 piercing damage, which cannot slay self. One allied unit in range gains one, (4+) two, or (6+) three vitality.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own or Allied Turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn start

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: For this turn only, self or allied unit in range may treat the current round number as either 2 or 5.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: (Round 3+): Attacks gain +1D

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: (Round 3+): Gain either physical or magical armor (choose).

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance (Round 3+): May step 2 either before or after ACTing.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: SUPER

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Gain two vitality. Until the start of this unit’s next turn, adjacent allies may spend vitality tokens on this unit as if they were their own.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self, Range 3-5

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Remove one or two vitality tokens on this unit, then deal 1 holy damage to that many units in range, ignoring line of sight, and push those units 1. Stance (4+): damage becomes piercing.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 2-5

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Create one or (4+) two or (6+) three hazards in range. May destroy a wall instead of creating a hazard.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Lacks miracle, but starts combat with 3 vitality tokens.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: When Bolides destroys a wall, it can deal 1 damage to an adjacent foe.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Ablutions gains stance (round 3+): gain 3 vitality instead, (round 5+): gain 4 vitality instead.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: All attacks automatically miss the holy body if not made from adjacent spaces.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: PHYS

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee, Attack

characteristics.name: Effect
On Hit
characteristics.$text: Self and an adjacent ally gain 1 vitality (Stance: R4+): 2 vitality. Then deal 1 damage and push 1. Cannot miss allies and pushes them +1.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Self or target unit converts all vitality into strength.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self, Ally, Melee

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Choose self or an adjacent ally. At the end of that unit’s turn, slay them. They splash (self) 1 holy damage to foes, 1 vitality to allies. Stance (R4+): Damage gains pierce and also clears a negative token from all allies in the area.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: At round 6+, Bible Thump deals 4 damage on hit.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Bible Thump removes a negative token before granting vitality.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Blood of the Covenant causes miracle to trigger on a 3+.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Step 1. Next attack from this unit gains +1D and +2 maximum range. This effect stacks.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Range 2-3

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage. Stance (Round 3+): with piercing. (Round 5+): 4 damage with piercing.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: If this unit does not move during its turn, it may remove a negative token from itself.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: Requiesce en Pace obliterates units it slays at round 3+.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: Requiesce en Pace pushes units one, (Round 3+) two, or (Round 5+) four spaces.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: MAG

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: An allied unit in range gains miracle. If it already had miracle, miracle triggers on a 2+ until the end of their next turn. At the end of that unit’s turn, they lose miracle.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Gain 1 vitality. Become unable to MOVE or step until start of this unit’s next turn. At the start of that turn, a number of allied units adjacent to this unit equal to the current round number may gain 1 vitality.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance (Odd): Remove a negative token from an ally in the area, then grant that ally 1 strength. (Even): Splash (self): Foes take 1 holy damage.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: While delay judgement is active, its target is curseproof.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Blessed Censer may remove up to three corpses or hazards in range.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance (Round 4+): Blessed Censer’s damage becomes piercing, and it also grants vitality when removing a negative token from an ally.

characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: MOVE again. Whirling Chain deals +damage equal to half the round number the next time it hits, rounded up. This effect does not stack.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Range 1-2

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage. Stance (Odd): and MOVE again, Stance (Even): and push unit 2

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: When MOVEing for the second time or more in a turn, gain 1 vitality.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: Whirling chain Obliterates foes it slays at round 3+

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Smite removes a negative token from this unit.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Whirling chain creates one or (5+) two hazards adjacent to its target after it resolves
